message:
feat(bubbletea/key): Add ShiftEnter, CtrlEnter, and CtrlShiftEnter key types

Extend KeyType enum with three new modifier+Enter combinations:

- ShiftEnter (-54): Shift+Enter, commonly used for soft line breaks in
  text editors and chat applications that use Enter for submission

- CtrlEnter (-55): Ctrl+Enter, often used as an alternative submit action
  or to insert literal newlines when Enter has special meaning

- CtrlShiftEnter (-56): Ctrl+Shift+Enter, available for additional
  application-specific keybindings

Implementation details:

- Add enum variants with negative discriminants following existing pattern
  for special keys (-54, -55, -56)

- Implement Display trait formatting as "shift+enter", "ctrl+enter",
  "ctrl+shift+enter" for human-readable key descriptions

- Update from_crossterm_key() to detect modifier combinations on Enter:
  - Check ctrl && shift first (most specific match)
  - Then ctrl alone
  - Then shift alone
  - Fall through to plain Enter if no modifiers

The order of checks in from_crossterm_key() is important: Ctrl+Shift+Enter
must be checked before individual Ctrl+Enter or Shift+Enter to avoid
incorrectly matching the more specific combination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -281,6 +281,12 @@ pub enum KeyType {
     F19 = -52,
     /// F20.
     F20 = -53,
+    /// Shift+Enter.
+    ShiftEnter = -54,
+    /// Ctrl+Enter.
+    CtrlEnter = -55,
+    /// Ctrl+Shift+Enter.
+    CtrlShiftEnter = -56,
 }
 
 impl fmt::Display for KeyType {
@@ -372,6 +378,9 @@ impl fmt::Display for KeyType {
             KeyType::F18 => "f18",
             KeyType::F19 => "f19",
             KeyType::F20 => "f20",
+            KeyType::ShiftEnter => "shift+enter",
+            KeyType::CtrlEnter => "ctrl+enter",
+            KeyType::CtrlShiftEnter => "ctrl+shift+enter",
         };
         write!(f, "{}", name)
     }
@@ -505,6 +514,9 @@ pub fn from_crossterm_key(
         }
         KeyCode::Char(' ') => (KeyType::Space, Vec::new()),
         KeyCode::Char(c) => (KeyType::Runes, vec![c]),
+        KeyCode::Enter if ctrl && shift => (KeyType::CtrlShiftEnter, Vec::new()),
+        KeyCode::Enter if ctrl => (KeyType::CtrlEnter, Vec::new()),
+        KeyCode::Enter if shift => (KeyType::ShiftEnter, Vec::new()),
         KeyCode::Enter => (KeyType::Enter, Vec::new()),
         KeyCode::Backspace => (KeyType::Backspace, Vec::new()),
         KeyCode::Tab if shift => (KeyType::ShiftTab, Vec::new()),
